use_cases: Notification center for SaaS dashboards displaying user activities like messages, achievements, and reminders
Activity feed dropdown in web applications requiring user engagement tracking
Notification bell component for apps needing real-time activity updates
Task assignment alerts in project management tools
Event reminder dropdown for calendar or scheduling applications
ai_summary: A notification and activity dropdown component featuring smooth open/close animations with rounded corner morphing transitions from rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl. Supports light and dark mode with subtle shadow effects for depth. Displays categorized activities (messages, achievements, reminders, offers, tasks) with icons, timestamps, and descriptions in a compact, collapsible format ideal for notification centers, dashboards, or navigation bars in SaaS and productivity applications.
